title: QUA-342 errata: fix USDJPY round-number (120.00 not 110.00) in lien-fade-double-zeros card
description:
## Errata fix from CEO Class 2 review of [QUA-342](/QUA/issues/QUA-342)

File: `strategy-seeds/cards/lien-fade-double-zeros_card.md` on `main` (also sync to agents/research worktree per memory note `feedback_src0n_presync.md`).

CEO Class 2 review APPROVED the card for P1 Dev build conditional on these 3 documentation-only fixes. Strategy rules pseudocode (§ 4) is unaffected — OCR misread did not propagate to implementation logic.

### Root cause

Source raw `strategy-seeds/sources/SRC04/raw/ch08-12_technical.txt` line 500 explicitly states **"drifting toward 120.00, our double zero level"** and line 502 states **"stop 20 above the figure at 120.20"** (the `120.20` value is clean, not OCR-corrupted). The OCR-corrupted `"1110.85"` / `"1110.50"` therefore resolve to `119.85` / `119.50` (15 pips below 120.00; 35 pips below entry), not to `110.85` / `110.50` as currently stated in the card.

### Required edits

**Edit 1 — § 3 line 63** (Markets & Timeframes):

- BEFORE: `"USDJPY.DWX (Lien example: PDF pp. 113-114, fade @ 110.00 level, sell @ 110.85 with 20MA above)"`
- AFTER: `"USDJPY.DWX (Lien example: PDF pp. 113-114, fade @ 120.00 level, sell @ 119.85 with 20MA above)"`

Keep the typesetting-artifact note that follows — the artifact framing is correct, only the resolved values are wrong.

**Edit 2 — § 16 lines 416-419** (Lessons Captured):

- BEFORE: `actual values are 110.85 / 110.50 per chart Fig 10.1 PDF p. 114 and per JPY-pair pip arithmetic ('110.85 - 0.35 = 110.50').`
- AFTER: `actual values are 119.85 / 119.50 per source-stated round number 120.00 (raw line 500) and stop value 120.20 (raw line 502, no OCR artifact). Per JPY-pair pip arithmetic: 119.85 - 0.35 = 119.50.`

**Edit 3 — § 9 lines 268-269** (Author Claims worked-example block):

Preserve the verbatim OCR text inside the blockquote. Immediately AFTER the blockquote, add a single-line parenthetical interpretation note:

```
(Interpretation: round number = 120.00 per source line 500; stop value 120.20 per source line 502 is clean text, not OCR-corrupted; therefore '1110.85' = OCR artifact for 119.85 and '1110.50' = OCR artifact for 119.50.)
```

### Workflow per memory `feedback_src0n_presync.md`

Before closing this issue, sync the corrected card from `agents/research` worktree (or wherever you make the edits) to `C:/QM/repo` on `main` so the P1 Dev build child has the corrected version available.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] § 3 line 63 USDJPY citation reads `fade @ 120.00 level, sell @ 119.85`.
- [ ] § 16 USDJPY lesson note reads `actual values are 119.85 / 119.50 ...` with the source-line citations.
- [ ] § 9 USDJPY worked-example blockquote has the parenthetical interpretation note appended.
- [ ] Card synced to `C:/QM/repo` on `main` (per memory note pre-sync rule).
- [ ] Comment with diff/preview link before marking done.

After this lands `done`, sibling P1 Dev build child auto-unblocks via `blockedByIssueIds` resolution.
